finding: Split purge is applied to the start of test rather than purging earlier overlapping label intervals
Profit barrier is checked before loss barrier inside the same OHLC bar
Eligibility uses full-file average volume and latest-file trailing volume
Raw data, results, models and many experiment patterns are ignored by Git
Absent canonical columns are zero-filled
Many indicator/regime/sweep variants and split choices were tried
Accuracy/AUC and sign tests are prominent promotion metrics
Volume-bar comparison is not shown to match horizon/sample/turnover
Manifest captures inventory but not hashes/schema/availability lineage
Research, collection, serving and one-off scripts share root
README, research summary and roadmap describe different primary systems
Paper #2 v2 fits one model on the first 80% and reuses it across nominal walk-forward test slices
implication: Nominal OOS folds can overlap fitted data and are not fold-specific retrains

finding: Information-bar threshold is derived from total volume over the complete sample
implication: Future data determines and can revise historical bar boundaries
required_action: Training-only frozen or causal rolling threshold

finding: Evaluator aggregates precomputed time-bar features while artifact trainer computes features after information-bar construction
implication: Evaluation does not validate artifact semantics

finding: BloFin threshold is computed but grouping still accumulates Binance volume and retains Binance price/features
implication: Second-venue robustness claim is not implemented

finding: Serving bot builds time bars while committed info artifacts require information-bar inputs
implication: Filename flip would create training-serving skew

finding: Latest info artifact reports 496 train bars for 113 features and 200 trees
implication: High instability/overfit risk and incomparable asset fits

finding: Info artifact metadata omits complete dates, classes, prediction coverage, returns, data hashes, thresholds and environment
Generic *_xgb.json discovery also matches _info artifacts if explicit screener protection is absent
implication: Representation-incompatible model namespace can leak into serving
required_action: Typed manifest and strict compatibility loader

finding: Working trend paper and systematic mapping review have different research roles
evidence_location: Karassavidis et al. 2025; Nguyen and Chan 2024
implication: Survey could be misclassified as model evidence
